cases.description: Create index returns acknowledged fields
Bulk ingest followed by a match query returns the expected docs
A second create with the same id conflicts after refresh
Get by id returns the stored source document
Deleting an existing document succeeds
A deleted document is not retrievable after refresh
A term query on a numeric field returns the exact matching document
A bool query with must and must_not narrows the hit set correctly
A bool query with filter, should, and minimum_should_match returns the filtered hits
A range query on the timestamp field returns the expected hit set
A simple_query_string query with a single term returns the expected hits
A multi_match query over logs-* returns the expected hits across two indices
A sorted logs-* query paginates with search_after across multiple indices
A date_histogram aggregation over logs-* returns the expected per-day buckets
A cardinality aggregation over logs-* returns the expected distinct field count
A terms aggregation with a metric sub-aggregation over logs-* returns the expected buckets
A date_histogram aggregation with a metric sub-aggregation over logs-* returns the expected bucket metrics
A date_histogram aggregation with a nested terms aggregation over logs-* returns the expected nested buckets
A terms aggregation with a nested date_histogram aggregation over logs-* returns the expected nested buckets
A query that matches nothing on an existing index reports zero hits
Update-by-query writes a scripted field that becomes searchable after refresh
Updating aliases allows subsequent search requests through the alias name
A created index template is visible via HEAD
The current engine returns the stored template body on GET
A field sort returns hits in descending numeric order
A terms aggregation over message values returns the expected buckets
Metric and filtered sub-aggregation results return the expected averages
GET / returns a basic Elasticsearch-compatible server info document
HEAD / returns 200
GET /_nodes returns the local compatibility node payload
GET /_license returns an active basic license payload
GET /_xpack returns the local feature listing payload
GET /_cluster/settings can include defaults without panicking
GET /_cluster/health/:name returns a green health payload
POST /_search/scroll fails with a clear unsupported message
POST /_search/template fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: search template API is not supported

cases.description: POST /_async_search fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: async search API is not supported

cases.description: GET /_cat/indices fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: cat indices API is not supported

cases.description: GET /_cat/aliases fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: cat aliases API is not supported

cases.description: GET /_ingest/pipeline/:name fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: Reading ingest pipeline definitions is not supported

cases.description: GET /_ingest/pipeline/_simulate fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: GET pipeline simulation is not supported

cases.description: POST /:index/_update/:id fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: document update API is not supported

cases.description: HEAD /:index returns 200 after the index is created
GET /:index returns aliases, mappings, and settings
GET /:index/_settings returns normalized string settings
GET /:index/_mapping returns the declared properties
GET /_alias returns the declared alias mapping
GET /:index/_alias returns the alias mapping for that index
GET /_alias/:alias returns the alias mapping
GET /:index/_alias/:alias returns the filtered alias mapping
HEAD /:index/_alias/:alias returns 200 when the alias exists
GET /_resolve/index/:name returns matching indices and aliases
GET /_field_caps returns searchable and aggregatable field types
POST /:index/_field_caps returns searchable and aggregatable field types
POST /_search can search across all indices when the query narrows to the created index
POST /_count returns the filtered document total
POST /:index/_count returns the filtered document total
HEAD /:index/_doc/:id returns 200 when the document exists
POST /:index/_mget returns found and missing docs
POST /_mget returns found and missing docs
POST /:index/_msearch returns multiple response items
POST /_msearch returns multiple response items
POST /:index/_doc/:id fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: document update API is not supported

cases.description: PUT /_ingest/pipeline/:name fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: Persisted ingest pipelines are not supported

cases.description: POST /_ingest/pipeline/_simulate returns processed docs
POST /_ingest/pipeline/:name/_simulate fails with a clear unsupported message

assertions.value: Named pipeline simulation is not supported

cases.description: GET /_template/:name returns the stored template body
GET /_component_template/:name returns the stored template body
POST /:index/_pit returns a point-in-time id payload
DELETE /_pit returns a point-in-time deletion payload
PUT /_ilm/policy/:name acknowledges policy creation
GET /_ilm/policy/:name returns the current local placeholder payload
POST /_monitoring/bulk returns the local ignored payload
